title: Dantewada District Assistant Veterinary Field Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
short_info: Dantewada District has published the Assistant Veterinary Field Officer (AVFO) (Third Class) Notification 2026 under Advt. No. 285 / P.Ch. / DMF / 2026-27. The recruitment drive aims to fill 4 Assistant Veterinary Field Officer (AVFO) (Third Class) positions. Candidates within the age range of 18 to 35 years and holding 10+2 with Biology along with a 2-year Veterinary Polytechnic Diploma are eligible to apply through Dantewada District Official Website. The application process is active up to 18 June 2026, and candidates can easily access the notification PDF and application details below.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 35 years Age as on 01-01-2026. Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.details: 10+2 with Biology from a recognized university/institution. 2-year Diploma in Veterinary Polytechnic.

selection_process: Educational Qualification Skill Test Experience Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Dantewada District Assistant Veterinary Field Officer (AVFO) (Third Class) Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.dantewada.nic.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
